Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your asset data is accessible, secure, and connected across your organisation. Your maintenance teams can work from the field on phones, your finance team can pull depreciation reports, and sensitive asset information stays protected under Singapore's PDPA rules. It matters when a technician needs to check an asset history on-site, or when you need to prove to auditors that your data is encrypted and access is controlled.

Asset Register & Lifecycle.narrative: This is your single source of truth for every asset your business owns—from purchase through retirement—and how much it's worth on your balance sheet. Singapore SMEs need this to satisfy accounting standards, manage depreciation correctly for tax, and know what assets you actually have. It matters when you're doing year-end accounts, when you need to claim a capital allowance, or when you're deciding whether to repair or replace a machine.

Maintenance Operations.narrative: This family turns maintenance from reactive firefighting into planned, tracked work that keeps equipment running and costs predictable. Your technicians log jobs, spare parts are managed so you're not scrambling for replacements, and you can see which assets are eating up maintenance budget. It matters when you want to stop emergency breakdowns from shutting down production, or when you need to prove to a customer that their leased equipment is being properly maintained.

Reliability & Compliance.narrative: This family keeps your assets safe, compliant with regulators, and running longer by catching problems early. You track mandatory inspections (lifts, pressure vessels, electrical), monitor asset health to predict failures before they happen, and maintain audit trails for insurance and compliance audits. It matters when a regulator inspects your facility, when you want to reduce unplanned downtime, or when an insurer asks for proof that you're maintaining equipment properly.

Capital & Commercial.narrative: This family links your capital spending (buying new equipment) to your asset register, tracks warranty and service contracts so repairs go to the right vendor, and helps you understand the true cost of ownership including energy use. Singapore SMEs benefit when they lease equipment to customers or need to track energy costs for sustainability reporting. It matters when you're commissioning a new production line, when a warranty claim comes in, or when you need to report carbon footprint to stakeholders.

Analytics & Intelligence.narrative: This family turns your maintenance data into dashboards and reports that show which assets are costing you the most, which maintenance strategies are working, and where to focus investment. You can spot trends—like a machine that keeps breaking down—and make data-driven decisions instead of guessing. It matters when you're presenting maintenance performance to the board, when you want to justify a new maintenance strategy, or when you're trying to reduce overall maintenance spend.
